title: Delegate or Do: The Decision Matrix
subtitle: Stop guessing if you should hire help. Make rational decisions based on your time, money, and risk tolerance.
heroDescription: We often waste hours trying to save a few dollars. Delegate or Do helps you quantify whether you should handle a task yourself or call in a professional.

benefits.title: Calculate Opportunity Cost
benefits.description: See the true cost of your time versus the professional's rate.

benefits.title: Risk Assessment
benefits.description: Factor in the cost of potential mistakes when doing it yourself.

benefits.title: Clear Recommendation
benefits.description: Get an objective data-backed decision: Delegate or Do.

faq.question: Is this tool free?
faq.answer: Yes, DailyLogic tools are 100% free and run locally in your browser.

faq.question: Should I always delegate if it's cheaper?
faq.answer: Not necessarily. Sometimes DIY helps you learn a skill. This tool focuses on financial and time efficiency.
